mood: Calm, trustworthy, clear, removing anxiety around digital subscriptions.

typography.headings_rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) and varied weights (e.g., font-medium to font-bold). NEVER use Inter for headings.

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Use generous padding: p-6 or p-8 inside cards, gap-6 for grid items.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Dashboard widgets should use flat backgrounds with a 1px solid border. Do not use heavy drop shadows. On hover, apply a slight lift (-translate-y-1) and a subtle shadow (shadow-sm).

components.shadcn: Use Shadcn components for complex interactions (dropdowns, dialogs, forms) but heavily customize to remove the default 'Vercel' look by applying the Organic & Earthy color palette, removing heavy shadows, and using 8px border-radius.
components.charts: Use Recharts for the Spending Trend (Line Chart), Category-wise (Pie Chart), and Monthly Expense (Bar Chart). The charts must be styled with the primary, accent, and danger colors, ensuring they are legible and elegant. Remove default grid lines or make them very subtle (stroke-gray-200 / border-border).
components.buttons: Primary CTA uses the primary color background. Hover state must maintain text contrast.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, and Form components. Left-align labels.

icons.instructions: Use Phosphor Icons in duotone or regular weight. Ensure they scale appropriately with text (e.g., w-5 h-5 for body text). Run: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

motion.interactions: Hover states are mandatory for all interactive elements. Use transition-colors duration-200. Avoid overwhelming animations on the dashboard—focus on functional micro-interactions.

avatar.description: Professional minimalist headshot for user profile avatar.

login_background.description: Subtle abstract warm sand texture for the split-screen login/register background.

data_testid_conventions.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based). Examples: `login-form-submit-button`, `subscription-card-netflix`, `total-spending-metric`.

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use 'Inter', 'Roboto', 'Open Sans', 'Lato' for headings. Strict enforcement of Work Sans for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body.
Do NOT use generic blue/purple SaaS templates. Use the provided earthy palette (Moss Green / Terracotta).
Avoid generic card shadows. Use subtle 1px borders (border-border) with flat backgrounds.
For the toggle, light mode is default.
All forms and interactive UI elements must use the required testing attributes.
Since charts are requested, use the recharts library and make sure tooltip backgrounds match the theme (dark or light surface colors).
